words.def: (folklore) a corpse that rises at night to drink the blood of the living
a number that has no factor but itself and 1
words.zh: n. 最佳部分, 初期, 全盛期

words.def: a set of two similar things considered as a unit
words.zh: n. 一雙, 一對, 一副

words.def: a unit of surface area equal to 100 square meters
words.zh: be的現在時複數或第二人稱單數

words.def: a diagrammatic representation of the earth's surface (or part of it)
words.zh: n. 地圖, 天體圖, 映像

words.def: a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of
words.zh: n. 空氣, 旋律, 態度

words.def: a period marked by distinctive character or reckoned from a fixed point or event
words.zh: n. 時代, 紀元, 時期

words.def: a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb
words.zh: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狹長港灣, 武器
